creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Turns out, things are more complicated than I thought.
The latest "release" of freerdp project is already in our ports tree. It's marked with 1.2.0-beta1+android9 tag on Sep 12, 2014
https://github.com/FreeRDP/FreeRDP/tags

Of course, they didn't stop development. But they didn't made any tags or releases since then.

Meanwhile, the latest remmina tag is 1.2.0-rcgit.5.
https://github.com/FreeRDP/Remmina/tags
And it doesn't build against our freerdp version. No way.

I tried to build all of the remmina rcgit.# and managed to build only v1.2.0-rcgit.1 tag with one additional patch.

I've been using remmina a bit and found one problem with rdp plugin. It doesn't work well with 'Negotiate' auth. But freerdp from cmd works well with it. So, I beleive, this bug is already fixed somewhere in remmina code, but it needs a lot of time to dig git/bugs/pull_requests to find actual commit.

Maybe someone will find it in the future. Or they rather release freerdp and remmina 1.2.0 versions.

I make remmina-plugins-rdp work at least somehow now.
